titleStmt.title: SII 24.86: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 86. (A.R. No. 127 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Begins with the introduction Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṇari etc. Registers a gift of land after purchase by Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ Kūttaṉār alias Viḻiñattaraiyar of Śiṟṟāmūr in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Rājanārāyaṇa-vaḷanāḍu for supplying flowers to the deity on different occasions. In continuation of this is engraved another record of the same king beginning with Pugaḻmādu-viḷaṅga, a greater portion of which is however built in. The record is dated in the 40th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemi Aḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻi lāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayarmunaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ po
tumaiyum ponniyāṭai nanṉilappāvai tanimaiyun tavira vantu punitaṟṟi rumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyir cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanatu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭu tanta
kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa pinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā tiṭṭamum vuṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭain toṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaiviritta
cait tannāṭukantu tānun tātaiyum pannāḷiṭṭappala pala mutuku payantetirmāṟi jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭan=tayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta poṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇa mennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poru parit talaṅka
riyumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal paṭarvatu polat tanperuñceṉai Evip pañcavaraivarumporuta porkkaḷattañci veru neḷit toṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamu muttamiṭ potiyilu mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit kennā
ṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellan=tani vicumpeṟṟi māveṟiya varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭ ṭaruḷit tiṟal koḷ virasiṅhāsanan tiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāra muntiruppuyatta(yatta)laṅkaḷum pola viramuntiyākamum tumaiyena tiyākavalli tina cintāmaṇi Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Ava
ḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkayar tilatam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulaka muṭaiṭayāḷ vāḻi malantinitiruppa Ūḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna tripuvanacakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kolot tuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇ ṟpatāvatu tiruvaraṅkatta nārāyaṇamuven=taveḷār Evalpaṭi śrī vayiṣṇava vāriyam nālūrt tiru nāṭuṭai
yānampiyum varakūr śrī vayiṣṇavatāsarum perumpuliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpati nampiyum Ālaṅkuṭit tiruvāyppāṭi tāsarum Iṭavai tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Amutinārum cipaṇ ṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanārum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutinārum kauciyankiṣṇanārum cātiya rāma Āritan kecavan kecavan Aṟivariyanārum Āritan cirākavan cikārimāṟanārum civayiṣṇavak kaṇakku
civayiṣṇavap piriyanum sabhaikkaṇakku nānūṟṟuvap piriyanum Aka vom rāja nārāyaṇa vaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūr nāṭṭu ciṟṟāmur ciṟṟāmuruṭaiyān paḷḷi koṇṭān kūttanārāna viḻiñattaraya Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷukku Ivar cevikkiṟa tiruppaṇikkuṭalaāna tirutta ṭuttuvāciyāl nāṅkaḷ Iṭṭuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu tenkarai rājamahentravaḷanā
ṭṭu Uṟaiyūrk kūṟṟattu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāka nūṟu samvatsarattiṟ Uttecam kāverikkulai Uṭaintu maṇaliṭāyp payir cey kkiṭanta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai muttarayar viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Uttama coḻa viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kāverik kulaikkut taṇṭuṟai pa
ḻa nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icaitta Innāṉkellaiyuḷpaṭṭa nila māvum tiruttaṟat tirutti tān veṇṭum payir ceytu maṟṟu veṇṭum nilattukkup puncey variceyil veli nilattukku paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl Aḷakkakkaṭava ḷa 7 ba kalamāka In nilattukku Ivvaricaiyina kiḻvan=ta nellu koyil cattu Aḷakkak kaṭavarākavum Innilattil Iṟai mikuti koṇṭu paṅkuṉiy periyatiru
nāḷum A ppa tirumuṟṟatte Eḻun=taruḷi tiruk ttu kiḻai copānattile maṇa n tiruppūppan talile Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tirumālai cāttiyaruḷi nitta tānap tānam paṇṇiyaruḷi Amāvāsippaṭiye Appamutu ceytaruḷi Aṭaikkāy Amutu ceytaruḷi Immaṇṇāḷan tiruppūppantali
(li)le Eḻuntaruḷi civayiṣṇavar tirunāḷ cevakam vantārkku viṭai ceytaruḷum potu Ippaṭiye Ivar ti ppāl tiruvārttai koṇṭaruḷiye(y) viṭai kuṭuttaruḷak kaṭavarākavum In nilattukku puncey varicai yallatu maṟṟa tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭatum ceyyak kaṭavarallā tārākavum Āka Ipparicu sammatittu Ivviḻiñattarayark
ku Innilam viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ivarkkāka Ittiruppaṇiyum Innilamuṅ kaikkoṇṭu ceyyum ttu Iṭavai nārāyaṇanampiyum Ivan vaṟkattārume ceyyakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭiyey rājamahentran tiruccuṟṟu māḷikaiyile cantirātitta varai cellak kallu veṭṭuvittuk koḷḷap peṟu varākavum sammatittom Ivvanaivom Ivar tiruvārt
taruḷi ntiyum cārtti Aruḷa ciṟukālai santi Aṟuku cārtti Aruḷavum Ucciyam potil san=ti viṣṇukrān=ti cārtti yaruḷavum Antiyam potai santi tiruttuḷāy cārtti Aruḷavum Ivar vaitta paṭiye(y) nittamāka Iṭavai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanampiyum Ivan vaṟkattārum cārttuvikka kaṭavarkaḷāka Ippaṭi cantirātittaval cellak kaṭavatāka
vippittu Ivvanaivom .§
Digital edition of SII 24.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
